courses.title: Our
courses.subtitle: Choose the program that fits your career goals

items.title: Desktop Repair Training
items.description: Learn fundamental laptop repair skills including hardware troubleshooting, component replacement, and basic diagnostics.
items.detailedDescription: Our Basic Laptop Repair course is designed to provide you with a solid foundation in laptop repair and maintenance. This beginner-friendly program covers essential hardware components, common issues, and practical repair techniques that will enable you to diagnose and fix typical laptop problems confidently.
whoShouldEnroll: Complete beginners with no prior technical experience
Students looking to start a career in laptop repair
Small business owners wanting to handle basic IT issues
Anyone interested in understanding how laptops work
Professionals seeking a career change into tech services
items.practicalTraining: Our hands-on approach ensures you work with real laptops from day one. You'll disassemble and reassemble various laptop models, diagnose actual hardware failures, and perform component replacements under expert supervision. This practical experience builds muscle memory and confidence that theoretical learning alone cannot provide.
careerOutcomes: Start as a Junior Laptop Technician

items.title: Laptop Chip Level Repair Training
items.description: Master complex chip-level repairs, circuit analysis, and component-level troubleshooting techniques.
highlights: Laptop Motherboard Fundamentals & Power Supply Sequence
VRM, RAM, PCH & Clock, Fan, USB, LVDS, HDMI, Audio Circuits
items.detailedDescription: Take your skills to the next level with our Advanced Motherboard Repair course. This intensive program delves deep into component-level troubleshooting, circuit board analysis, and micro-soldering techniques. You'll learn to diagnose and repair complex motherboard issues that most technicians consider irreparable.
whoShouldEnroll: Technicians with basic laptop repair experience
Graduates of our Basic Laptop Repair course
Anyone looking to master high-value repair skills
items.practicalTraining: Work with advanced diagnostic equipment including oscilloscopes, multimeters, and thermal cameras. You'll practice BGA reballing, micro-soldering on actual motherboards, and learn to read schematics like a pro. Our experienced instructors guide you through real-world repair scenarios that you'll encounter in professional settings.

items.title: Professional Certification Course
items.description: Comprehensive training covering all aspects of laptop repair with industry-recognized certification and placement support.
highlights: Laptop motherboard architecture and power section analysis
Schematic reading, tracing, and board view interpretation
Component testing, fault diagnosis, and dead board repair
Advanced soldering techniques, BGA rework, and tools handling
items.detailedDescription: Our flagship Professional Certification Course is a complete career transformation program. Combining basic fundamentals with advanced techniques, this comprehensive course prepares you for immediate employment in the laptop repair industry. You'll receive industry-recognized certifications, internship opportunities, and guaranteed placement support.
whoShouldEnroll: Anyone serious about laptop repair career
items.practicalTraining: Experience the most comprehensive hands-on training available. Work with over 50 different laptop models, handle real customer repairs during your internship, and learn business aspects including customer service, pricing strategies, and workshop management. Our 95% placement rate speaks to the quality and depth of this program.
